parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: 'landslide', severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: 'Landslide Susceptibility Index: ' + $json.lsi + '. 7-day rainfall: ' + $json.past7DayRainMm + 'mm. Soil saturation: ' + Math.round($json.avgSoilMoisture * 100) + '%.', source: 'n8n_landslide_monitor', metadata: { lsi: $json.lsi, rainfall7d: $json.past7DayRainMm, soilMoisture: $json.avgSoilMoisture } }) }}
